title: fedora 28: podman run: permission denied (AVC)
body:
[this is not a podman issue; it's Fedora. I'm filing here in hopes of helping someone else.]

Problem
======
`podman run ANYTHING`, as root (not rootless!)  fails with an AVC on Fedora 28:
```
# podman run alpine date                                                        
Error relocating /lib/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1: RELRO protection failed: Permission denied                                                                           
Error relocating /bin/date: RELRO protection failed: Permission denied
```

Solution
======
`dnf reinstall container-selinux`

Explanation
========
I have no idea. This seems to be happening on new f28 installs/images, but not on upgrades of older installs. My guess is that the container-selinux rpm postinstall hooks aren't being run, but that's an uneducated stab. Proper version as of this writing is `container-selinux-2.76-1.git87fae85.fc28`.

Other factors to look for (or search engines to index):
```
# ls -lZd /var/lib/containers
drwx------. 3 root root unconfined_u:object_r:var_lib_t:s0 4096 Dec 18 16:58 /var/lib/containers
                                              ^^^^^^^^^---- should be container_var_lib_t

# chcon -t container_var_lib_t /var/lib/containers
chcon: failed to change context of '/var/lib/containers' to ‘unconfined_u:object_r:container_var_lib_t:s0’: Invalid argument

# semanage fcontext -l | grep container_var_lib_t
[no output]
```
You may need to `restorecon /var/lib/containers` after reinstalling container-selinux.

keywords: f28 fedora28 selinux

comments.body:
## UPDATE: 2021-05-18 : podman 3.2, kernel 5.13

If you see a similar error with podman >= 3.2 and kernel >= 5.13, you need to install **container-selinux >= 2.162.1-3** (on Fedora). You can confirm via:
```console
$ ls -Z ~/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay{,-images,-layers}
unconfined_u:object_r:container_ro_file_t:s0 ...
```
You should see **`container_ro_file_t`** everywhere. You should not see `data_home_t`.
